vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn/không gian yên tĩnh dành cho cộng đồng
vocab.example: I believe a new library or garden would act as a communal sanctuary, offering a peaceful escape from the hustle and bustle of city life.

vocab.meaning: đường phố chính dành riêng cho người đi bộ (không có xe cộ)
vocab.example: Converting the main street into a pedestrianized thoroughfare would make the neighborhood much more walkable and inviting.

vocab.meaning: sự phân tầng xã hội (nghĩa trong bài: không gian công cộng giúp xóa bỏ rào cản này)
vocab.example: Public spaces are vital because they help bridge the gap of social stratification, allowing people from all walks of life to mingle.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng phục vụ giải trí
vocab.example: The current lack of leisure infrastructure in this district means that residents have very few options for outdoor activities.

vocab.meaning: sự hồi sinh/chỉnh trang đô thị
vocab.example: The introduction of more plazas and parks is a key component of urban revitalization that could breathe new life into our aging suburbs.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp/sức lôi cuốn về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Adding fountains and well-kept flower beds would significantly enhance the aesthetic appeal of the local area.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm/điểm kết nối giữa các thế hệ
vocab.example: I’d love to see a multipurpose park that serves as a multigenerational hub where both seniors and children can spend their time.

vocab.meaning: các dãy nhà ở bị phát triển quá mức (thiếu không gian trống)
vocab.example: Our town is currently dominated by overdeveloped residential blocks, leaving almost no room for public squares.

vocab.meaning: có lợi cho sức khỏe tinh thần
vocab.example: Having more green open spaces nearby is highly conducive to mental well-being, as it reduces stress and anxiety.

vocab.meaning: chất xúc tác cho sự tương tác xã hội
vocab.example: A community center would serve as a catalyst for social interaction, helping neighbors get to know one another better.
